message:
feat(database): add generic connection pool with health checks (asupersync-c3d2x)

ConnectionManager trait, DbPool<M>, DbPoolConfig, PooledConnection,
DbPoolStats. Validation on checkout, idle/lifetime eviction, warm-up,
close/discard semantics, Deref/Drop auto-return. 32 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
